caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks directly to the camera against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved top featuring delicate floral embroidery and a dark beaded necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a gold circular logo is accompanied by the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman's facial expressions shift to convey speech; she begins with a neutral, focused look, then transitions into a slight smile and open-mouthed articulation as she continues talking. Her head remains centered and steady throughout the clip, while her mouth moves to form words, indicating she is delivering a presentation or lecture.
